prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4914名、4913名、5290名、4809名、5535名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准位次约5535名，较2024年后移约726名，下行趋势明显；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年107人、2022年105人、2023年105人、2024年104人、2025年104人；2026年为103人，较2025年减少1人，属小幅缩招，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第26名左右（2026年排名第26），属于国内顶尖综合性大学，层次稳固；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池事件等13起）及学术不端舆情，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第40），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；2025年投档异常信号为中关注（江苏法学暴跌、黑龙江临床组下降），显示部分省份出现报考热度波动；吉林大学拥有15个A-及以上学科，包括考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、化学A、数学A、机械工程A、法学A、物理学A等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；法学分化观望；临床医学推荐。天津市2026年普通高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约14%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区。该校在天津市招生计划近年稳定在103–107人之间，2026年计划103人，占比较小且略有缩减。天津考生对东北高校的地域偏好一般，无明显地域加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩减、天津市考生总数大幅增加（约14%）以及声誉负面信号，预计2026年吉林大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次在2025年基准5535名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约5703名，区间5203–6203名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 4914, 4913, 5290, 4809, and 5535 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5535, which is approximately 726 places lower than in 2024, indicating a clear downward trend. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 107 in 2021, 105 in 2022, 105 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 104 in 2025; for 2026, it is 103, a decrease of 1 from 2025, which is a slight reduction and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has been stable at around 26th in recent years (ranked 26th in 2026), making it a top-tier comprehensive university with a solid standing. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (13 incidents including the Qianwei campus bathhouse incident) and academic misconduct controversies, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 40th overall), indicating moderate to high attention on short video platforms. The abnormal signal for 2025 admission is moderate attention (a sharp drop in law in Jiangsu and a decline in the clinical medicine group in Heilongjiang), showing fluctuations in application popularity in some provinces. Jilin University has 15 A- or above disciplines, including Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Law A, Physics A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts candidates for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Law is in a wait-and-see state; Clinical Medicine is recommended. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. Its enrollment plan in Tianjin has been stable at 103–107 in recent years, with 103 planned for 2026, accounting for a small proportion and slightly reduced. Tianjin candidates generally have average regional preference for universities in the Northeast, with no obvious regional advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Tianjin (about 14%), and negative reputation signals, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Jilin University in Tianjin's comprehensive category in 2026 will continue to move backward from the 2025 baseline of 5535. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5703, with a range of 5203–6203.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5703, with a range of 5203–6203. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 5203 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Clinical Medicine 5+3). Candidates with rankings around 5700 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electrical Engineering, Communication Engineering, Mathematics, etc.), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 6203 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Economics, Accounting, Software Engineering, etc.), while also paying attention to new or expanded majors in the enrollment plan.
